inspectables.name: Terminal
text: The terminal indicates that all greenhouse systems are operating normally.
WARNING: Fire detected in Botanical Sector. Emergency response teams report immediately.

inspectables.name: Locker
text: Your locker contains only spare clothing.

inspectables.name: Burned Plants
text: Most of the plants have been destroyed by the fire.

inspectables.name: Water Pump
text: The emergency sprinkler system has already shut down.

inspectables.name: Wall Plaque
text:
"And again,
as swarms of bees do not gather for the sake of making honeycomb
but make the honeycomb because they are gregarious by nature,
so human beings—and to a much higher degree—exercise their skill together in action
and thought because they are naturally gregarious."

"And so,
if that virtue which centres in the safeguarding of human interests,
that is, in the maintenance of human society, were not to accompany the pursuit of knowledge,
that knowledge would seem isolated and barren of results."

"In the same way,
courage, if unrestrained by the uniting bonds of society,
would be but a sort of brutality and savagery."
